subject: chemistry
title: 20N.1.HL.TZ0.36
question_html:
What will be the major product in the reaction between but-1-ene and Hbr?

A.  2-bromobut-1-ene

B.  1-bromobut-1-ene

C.  2-bromobutane

D.  1-bromobutane
examiners_html: The vast majority selected the correct product for the reaction of but-1-ene and HBr although quite a few selected the minor product of 1-bromobutane.
